title: DonutCraft
description: A modpack focused on Industrialization, Automation, Modern Warfare, and more! Used on the DonutCraft Server.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d44f09ec41bfc95d0f6e27ebbf94a569a1c97cc5_0.webp)This is a modpack featuring mods focused around **warfare**, **industrialization**, and **automation**, alongside a decent amount of **Optimization** and **Quality of Life** Mods.

Notable mods are Create, Clockwork, Ice and Fire, Mekanism, Farmers delight, Auto Mobility, and Deeper and Darker.
NOTE: This modpack has been made for the DonutWT Discord server found here -> [DonutWT](https://discord.gg/donutwt)
If you are intrested in joining their Modded Minecraft Server, join the discord server and go to 
#mc-server-info
For information on how to join. Happy exploring!
